title: Include configured registries in podman info output
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**: FEATURE REQUEST

Opening this feature request to display configured registries information in `podman info` output.
This would be similar to what we see in `docker info` for secure and insecure registries configured in `/etc/containers/registries.conf`

comments.body:
With PR https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/422 , I now see registries information in `podman info` :)

Snip from `podman info`:
```
insecure registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
registries:
  registries:
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - registry.access.redhat.com
```
LGTM +1
